column1: # Knowledge Base — Gym Training Chatbot (NTU ISYS30221)
# Written in NLTK First-Order Logic (FOL) syntax.

column2: non-blank line is a single FOL expression.

column1: # Lines beginning with # are ignored by the loader.
# This KB is modelled on the astronomy example in the sample
# This KB uses the same structural approach but for gym training.
#   compound_exercise(x)       - x is a compound (multi-joint) exercise
#   isolation_exercise(x)      - x is an isolation (single-joint) exercise
#   lower_body_exercise(x)     - x primarily trains the lower body
#   upper_body_exercise(x)     - x primarily trains the upper body
#   full_body_exercise(x)      - x trains the whole body
#   builds_muscle(x)           - x is effective for hypertrophy
#   burns_calories(x)          - x is effective for calorie burning
#   requires_warmup(x)         - x requires a proper warm-up
# --- Ground facts: Which body region exercises target ---
# Compound exercises also build muscle directly (via overload)
# All exercises that build muscle require a proper warm-up
# Isolation exercises are NOT compound exercises
# (Stated directly as facts rather than implications to keep the
#  KB simple and compatible with NLTK's resolution prover)
